title: Cobblemon Thufizer
description: Bring Thu-Fi-Zer from the Pokémon Adventures Manga into Cobblemon!
body:
# Thu-Fi-Zer [Cobblemon] From the Pokémon Adventures manga the fusion of Zapdos, Moltres, and Articuno: Thu-Fi-Zer. ⚠️ **IMPORTANT:** - Requires **Mega Showdown** For the version with custom ability - Must be installed in both the **datapack** and **resourcepack** folders. - **can spawn anywhere in the overworld as an ultra rare spawn (weight 1) and gets 1.5x times boost at daytime, 2.5x when raining and 4x when thundering (all stacking)** - can also use my new fusion mod with this addon to create it without having random biome spawn https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-poke-fusion ---
📥 Installation Instructions **Singleplayer:** - Place the `.zip` file into `/saves/[WORLDNAME]/datapacks` - Place the `.zip` into `/resourcepacks` - Enable in-game via `ESC → Options → Resource Packs` **Servers:** - Place the `.zip` into `/world/datapacks` - (Folder name may differ — e.g., `myworld` or custom) - If unsure, consult your host’s guide on adding datapacks. **Every Player** must also have the `.zip` installed as a **Resource Pack**. - Best practice: each player installs it manually. - You *can* use a server resource pack, but Cobblemon add-ons can be finicky with that.
---
⚔️ Base Stats & Typing **Name:** Thu-Fi-Zer **Typing:** Flying **Base Stats (BST 640):** - HP : 90 - Attack : 100 - Defense : 100 - Special Attack : 125 - Special Defense : 125 - Speed : 100
---
🌟 No Custom /Custom Abilities - Pressure, H: adaptability - **Custom Ability Thufizer Domination:** - Fire, Ice, and Electric moves 33% stronger and 33% more accurate. Cycles heads every 3 turns - Moltres (Turns 1-3): Fire moves always burn foes +1 SpA on hit. - Zapdos (Turns 4-6): Electric moves hit 100% accurately +1 Spe on hit. - Articuno (Turns 7-9): Ice moves gain +1 priority, 75% freeze chance +1 SpD on hit
---
🔥 Custom Moves N/A
---
⚙️ My Other Addons * https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-digital-monsters * https://modrinth.com/datapack/original-dragon-cobblemon * https://modrinth.com/datapack/blue-eyes-dragon-cobblemon * https://modrinth.com/datapack/red-eyes-black-dragon-cobblemon
